query: Italian eggplant parmigiana with tomato sauce, mozzarella, parmesan, and basil

draft.title: Parmigiana di Melanzane
draft.description: Classic Italian eggplant parmigiana layered with tomato sauce, mozzarella, parmesan, and fresh basil for a rich, savory baked dish.

ingredients.name: tomato sauce
ingredients.note: preferably homemade or good quality passata

steps.text: Slice the eggplants into 1 cm thick slices. Lightly salt them and let sit in a colander for 20 minutes to remove bitterness and excess moisture. Pat dry with paper towels.
Lightly dust the eggplant slices with flour. Heat olive oil in a large frying pan over medium heat and fry the slices until golden on both sides. Drain on paper towels.
Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F). Spread a thin layer of tomato sauce in a baking dish.
Arrange a layer of fried eggplant slices over the sauce. Add some tomato sauce on top, then scatter torn mozzarella, grated parmesan, and a few basil leaves.
Repeat layering until all ingredients are used, finishing with a layer of sauce, parmesan, and basil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35-40 minutes until bubbly and golden on top. Let rest for 10 minutes before serving.
